description: Document hierarchy flow-down: five plates (LAW/REGULATION w/ scales glyph + 14 CFR tag, CODE/ASME BPVC, STANDARD/AWS D1.1-EN ISO, SPECIFICATION/CONTRACT-PO, PROCEDURE/EMPLOYER VT PROC w/ clipboard glyph) revealed top-down, then a drawn REQUIREMENTS down-arrow with crossed-out up-arrow (NEVER UP). Right side: always-visible isometric controlled-doc stack (PURCHASE ORDER / QUALITY MANUAL / VT PROCEDURE, REV chips, dsRevTag pulse target, dsScanLine sweep target) anchoring the vt2-5-2 title panel.
